title: pleiotaxis rugosa
intro: Pleiotaxis rugosa, also known as the hairy pleiotaxis, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pleiotaxis rugosa include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Pleiotaxis rugosa can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
